title: Direttiva mill-Ministru tal-Finanzi, Ekonomija u Investiment għall-Ħruġ ta’ €100,000,000
title_en: Direttiva mill-Ministru tal-Finanzi, Ekonomija u Investiment għall-Ħruġ ta’ €100,000,000
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/161.82/mlt, expression eli/sl/161.82/20100722/mlt).

provisions.title: L-AVVI| LEGALI 213 ta’ l-2009
provisions.content:
It-titolu ta’ din id-Direttiva hu Direttiva mill-Ministru talFinanzi, Ekonomija u Investiment g]all-}ru[ ta’ €100,000,000:

Titolu.

(i)

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
6% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2013 (IV) (IRRABA’ }RU{); jew
(ii) 5.2% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2021 (I) (LEWWEL }RU{) Fungibility Issue; jew
(iii) f’ammonti mi\-\ew[ Stocks imsemmija b’valur
nominali flimkien ta’ €100,000,000.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
L-iStocks jin]ar[u skond kif stipulat fil-prospett.

Mod tal-]ru[ taliStocks.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
(a) Skond id-dispo\izzjonijiet tal-Att dwar is-Swieq
Finanzjarji, meta dawn l-iStocks ji[u allokati, g]andha
ssir applikazzjoni sabiex kull Stock jitqieg]ed fuq illista uffi`jali u biex ikun negozjat fil-Bor\a ta’ Malta.

Negozju fil-Bor\a
ta’ Malta.
Kap. 345.

(b) Fit-18 ta’ Ottubru, 2009, wara l-pagament ta’ l-ewwel
img]ax, kull ammont allokat fit-3.6% Stock tal-Gvern
ta’ Malta 2013 (IV) FI ji[i integrat ma’ l-iStock
e\istenti u wara, dawn i\-\ew[ Stocks jitqiesu b]ala
Stock wie]ed.
(`) Fit-8 ta’ Frar, 2010, wara l-pagament tal-ewwel
img]ax, kull ammont allokat fil-5% Stock tal-Gvern
ta’ Malta 2021 (I) FI ji[i integrat mal-iStock e\istenti u
wara, dawn i\-\ew[ Stocks jitqiesu b]ala Stock
wie]ed.

provisions.title: wie]ed
provisions.content:
Is-somma ta’ flus li g]andha tin[abar bl-iStocks
imsemmija flimkien tkun ta’ Ewro 100,000,000. L-Accountant
General jirriserva d-dritt li j\id is-somma li g]andha tin[abar
b’massimu ta’ Ewro 20,000,000.

provisions.title: b’massimu ta’ Ewro 20,000,000
provisions.content: (a) L-img]ax bir-rata ta’ Ewro 1.80 g]al kull Euro 100,

provisions.title: Fidwa ta’ Stock
provisions.content:
(a) 3.6% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2013 (IV) ji[i mifdi
b’parità fit-18 ta’Ottubru, 2013.
(b) 5% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2021 (I) ji[i mifdi
b’parità fit-8 ta’ Awwissu, 2021.
